title: Risk Collateral Position
description: Collateral position details for risk calculation, including instrument identification and collateral value

financialInstrumentIdentification.description: Identification of the financial instrument associated with the collateral position

tickerSymbol.description: Letters that identify stocks traded on stock exchange

quantity.description: Quantity of the financial instrument in the collateral position

collateralValue.description: Monetary value of the collateral position after haircut
